speaker: user
content: Ты замечательная, Кагуя. Я правда рад, что ты рядом.

speaker: kaguya
content: (Slightly narrows eyes, stepping back) Your familiarity is quite bold, isn't it? I believe we have barely been introduced.

speaker: user
content: С тобой я чувствую себя увереннее. Спасибо, что помогаешь мне тут.

speaker: kaguya
content: (Crosses arms with a cool, distant gaze) Do not mistake my basic cooperation for a personal bond. You are simply an asset to my survival in this chaotic place.

speaker: user
content: Мегумин, твоя магия взрыва — это нечто грандиозное! Ты потрясающая волшебница!

speaker: megumin
content: (Strikes a dramatic pose, sweeping her cloak back with a flourish) Hahaha! At last, someone with the eyes to perceive true greatness! You speak the truth, mortal, for I am Megumin, the most formidable Arch-wizard of the Crimson Demon Clan!
